response.step_by_step_log:
1.  Identified the performer as Airani Iofifteen (Iofi) from the video content.
2.  Observed on-screen text "Lagu Tanpa Huruf R" and "#iofiLucidDream".
3.  Searched for "Lagu Tanpa Huruf R Iofi lyrics" and confirmed the original artist as Nadya Fatira.
4.  Found the lyrics in Indonesian and generated an English translation.
5.  Mapped scenes: 00:00-03:52 is the song performance, 03:52-04:59 is the speaking/outro segment.
response.global_summary: A performance of "Lagu Tanpa Huruf R" by Airani Iofifteen, followed by a speaking segment.

scenes.description: Airani Iofifteen performs "Lagu Tanpa Huruf R" while playing guitar. Song title and hashtag are displayed at the top corners.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ini kisahnya anak manusia
Kau bisa memanggilnya dengan nama Nadya
Sebuah konsonan yang menyulitkan
Membuat lidahnya bosan tak bisa ucapkan

Dia coba pahami
Setiap manusia punya hebat
Punya cacat
Dia coba nikmati
Hidup ini cuma sekali

Dia
Hanya punya modal cinta
Yang dia embuskan dalam setiap lagunya
Tak inginkan semua 'tuk suka
Dia
Hanya ingin tuliskan lagu
Tentang semua yang ada dalam hatinya
Bila tak suka tentu saja tak mengapa

Sejak kecil dia punya mimpi
Jadi musisi atau apapun di bidang seni
Tumbuh dewasa, bulatlah sudah
Keputusannya 'tuk dapatkan mimpinya

Dia
Hanya punya modal cinta
Yang dia embuskan dalam setiap lagunya
Tak inginkan semua 'tuk suka
Dia
Hanya ingin tuliskan lagu
Tentang semua yang ada dalam hatinya
Bila tak suka tentu saja tak mengapa
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
This is the story of a human child
You can call her by the name Nadya
A consonant that is difficult
Makes her tongue bored, unable to pronounce

She tries to understand
Every human has greatness
Has flaws
She tries to enjoy
This life is only once

She
Only has the capital of love
Which she breathes into every one of her songs
Doesn't want everyone to like it
She
Only wants to write songs
About everything that is in her heart
If you don't like it, of course it doesn't matter

Since childhood she had a dream
To be a musician or whatever in the field of art
Growing up, it was final
Her decision to get her dream

She
Only has the capital of love
Which she breathes into every one of her songs
Doesn't want everyone to like it
She
Only wants to write songs
About everything that is in her heart
If you don't like it, of course it doesn't matter

scenes.description: Airani Iofifteen talks to the audience.
